research_question: After freezing Alpha158 VSUMD60 as a reserve atomic keeper because its edge proved more bottom-avoidance than head-extraction under walk-forward, which one of three head-extraction oriented Alpha158 reserve cards corr20, corr30, and cord30 can beat the frozen v18 working reference on the trainval-only snapshot under a predeclared validation window and a single fixed boolean promotion rule?

time_partition_plan.note: The fixed test window 2022-01 to 2025-12 remains excluded by construction through the trainval-only snapshot.

confirmatory_shortlist_rationale.selection_source: restricted to Alpha158 exact standalone-positive reserve cards that are more plausible head-extraction candidates than the frozen VSUMD60 reserve keeper
selection_logic: Prefer candidates whose prior signal-edge evidence looked more top-head oriented and less bottom-avoidance oriented.
Prefer reserve cards that remain close enough to the existing v18 contract to keep execution comparability intact.
Keep shortlist width capped at three to preserve confirmatory budget discipline.
confirmatory_shortlist_rationale.excluded_candidates_note: VSUMD60 is intentionally excluded because its standalone mainline has already been frozen to reserve after walk-forward regime diagnosis.

reference_contract.score_family_rule: Use the frozen v18 working reference operational contract unchanged as the comparator for this shortlist round.
reference_contract.note: The reference is executed only as a frozen comparator and is not part of the confirmatory shortlist count.

decision_rule.boolean_expression: (validation_annual_relative_return - reference_validation_annual_relative_return > 0.005) AND (validation_relative_ir - reference_validation_relative_ir > 0.05) AND (validation_max_drawdown - reference_validation_max_drawdown >= -0.05) AND (validation_avg_turnover_daily - reference_validation_avg_turnover_daily <= 0.02) AND (validation_avg_invested_weight >= 0.15)
decision_rule.pass_interpretation: A candidate passes only if it beats the frozen v18 reference on return and IR, does not materially worsen drawdown or turnover, and maintains minimum invested weight.

frozen_dimensions.score_family_cardinality: single signal only for shortlisted candidates

disallowed_changes: Do not access or regenerate any snapshot that contains the 2022-2025 frozen test window.
Do not change the shortlist membership after registration.
Do not change candidate raw fields, ranking directions, or candidate names after registration.
Do not add overlays, family blends, or multi-signal combinations inside this round.
Do not change TopK width, benchmark, execution semantics, or cost semantics.
Do not change the validation window or the boolean promotion rule after registration.
notes: This confirmatory shortlist explicitly changes the research question away from bottom-avoidance style reserve cards and toward head-extraction reserve cards.
The shortlist is intentionally capped at three candidates to keep the next stage small, hard, and fast.
VSUMD60 remains a reserve atomic keeper and is not reopened inside this round.
